creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
On Fri, Apr 21, 2000 at 11:09:54AM -0400, Mike Buchanon wrote:
> >Synopsis:       lesstif-0.90.0 won't install from port
> >Organization:
> Michigan State University

Hi there! I just passed Flint about an hour and a half ago. I'm home in
Lapeer County now, right off I-69. :-)

> 	Add build_depends for autoconf and automake.  Please
> 	note that this is the first time I'm trying this.  I used

The correct way to do this would be

BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${LOCALBASE}/bin/automake:${PORTSDIR}/devel/automake

...

USE_AUTOCONF=   yes

I'll test whether this fixes lesstif and commit. Thanks!

-- 
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
